content.full_text:
STATE OF CALIFORNIA 
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION 
· 428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329 
I (916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886 
Vincent C. Ewing 
Chico City Attorney 
Alvarez-Glasman & Colvin 
13181 Crossroads Parkway North 
Suite 400 - West Tower 
City oflndustry, CA 91746 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
Our File No. W-17-011 
Dear Mr. Ewing: 
January 25, 2017 
This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the conflict of interest 
provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act"). The Act requires the Commission to provide 
written advice to any person whose duties under the Act are in question or to that person's 
authorized representative. {Section 83114(b); Regulation 18329(a).) However, the Commission may 
decline to provide written advice if it would be inappropriate or otherwise not in the public interest 
to do so. (Regulation 18329(b)(8)(F).) 
After a careful review of the facts you provided, we decline to provide written advice to 
you at this time, since the same or similar issues are currently the subject of a court proceeding in 
which both the City of Chico and Councilmember Karl Ory are litigants. 
Should you have any questions, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660. 
ZWN:jgl 
Sincerely, 
Hyla Wagner 
General Counsel 
g-
:W.Norton 
Senior Commission Council

sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document is a declination letter (W-17-011W). No separate QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections with headers; conclusion text is embedded in the body of the letter. The 'W' in document ID suffix and filename indicates withdrawal/declination.
